meaning: n.史诗,伟大事迹adj.英雄的,壮丽的,大规模的
examples: Their four-hour match on Centre Court was an epic.
The film is long and dramatic but does not quite earn the epithet 'epic'.
There are a number of distinguishing characteristics by which you can identify a Hollywood epic.
Like someone is whispering in your ear, but also to get the epic-ness at times.
One shudders to think of the future calamity of an even worse, more epic, flash crash.
